privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated user records in the 2N Access Commander environment. The primary user 'Mei-Ling Zhang' (m.zhang@buildingtech.com) is provisioned via seed_ac_data.py with an original RFID card '0004521886'. The duplicate user 'Meiling Zhang' (ml.zhang@buildingtech.com) is dynamically injected via setup_task.sh and assigned a secondary RFID card '0009876543'. The final audit report is expected at '/home/ga/Documents/merge_report.txt', confirming the target deletion and card consolidation.
